Video.summary: Tonight's episode features another installment of "The Family", and Tim Conway's "World's Oldest Man".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Sammy Davis, Jr. stars as a flamboyant galley slave, then appears before the Queen & King as a debt collector.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi joins Carol, Burt Reynolds shows up for Q&A, and John Davidson salutes classic movies from MGM.
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds

Image.alt: Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: Frank Gorshin dazzles with his famous impressions, then joins up with Lana Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a psychiatrist trying to unlock the secret of Carol's crying, and Carol as Stella Toddler.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Maggie Smith returns to guest star as the erudite teacher of Eunice and Ed's son Bubba in "The Family."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Cass Elliot and Ricardo Montalban guest. Cass joins a sketch about wallflowers, Ricardo takes a playboy role.
Video.title: Ricardo Montalban, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Shirley Jones drop in to join in the fun!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shirley Jones, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Carol's guests tonight are Garry Moore and Durward Kirby.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Don Adams plays a talk show host beset with technical difficulties and Carol's agitated husband.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lesley Ann Warren, Don Adams

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars in a take-off on film "Double Indemnity"..here named "Double Calamity", with Carol too.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Kaye Stevens and Audrey Meadows guest star, featuring "As The Stomach Turns" and the "10th Avenue Family."
Video.title: Kaye Stevens, Audrey Meadows

Video.summary: William Conrad & Isabel Sanford star! Short spoofs highlight this episode, which also features "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: William Conrad, Isabel Sanford

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray stars as Carol's rival. Also, a "V.I.P." interview and a satiric look at foreign airlines.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Marty Feldman & Carol Channing guest. Features an airline crew who causes havoc, and wacky commercial spoofs.
Video.title: Marty Feldman, Carol Channing

Video.summary: Tonights guests are Tim Conway and Eydie Gorme!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray appears on "As The Stomach Turns." Also featured: "Carol & Sis" go gaga over Roger's briefcase.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: The season finale features Carol putting the cast on the spot for Q&A, as well as beloved recurring sketches.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays an airport guard. Carol & Harvey play actors suffering Carol's lack of contact lenses.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Carol & Sis come home from a costume party. Meanwhile, Carol and Harvey delight with a pair of sketches.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Madeline Kahn appears in the latest sketch with "The Family".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Madeline Kahn

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Carol Channing join Carol, Harvey, Vicki, and Lyle for a tribute to the Academy Awards.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Sammy Davis Jr. stars, appearing as a star who returns to his hometown. Also: a look at a No-Frills Airline.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Anthony Newley & Bernadette Peters guest. Featuring The Invisible Man's mother and a man who can get anything.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Anthony Newley

Video.summary: Join Carol, Harvey, Vicki, and Tim as they spoof a classic Joan Crawford film in the sketch "Mildred Fierce."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Alan King & Lena Zavaroni join Carol for sketches set on Hollywood Boulevard, a baseball game, and a bus stop.
Video.title: Alan King, Lena Zavaroni

Video.summary: Guests Ronnie Schell and Vicki Carr take to the stage with stand-up and song (respectively)!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ronnie Schell, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Carol is a dowdy secretary discouraging applicants, and the movie spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays The Oldest Galley Slave, an ad exec visiting an actress, and a lawyer who is a rabbit.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tonight's guest: Mr. Steve Lawrence!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Mrs. Wiggins attends a convention with Mr. Tudball! And, saluting the year in TV commercials with Ben Vereen.
Video.title: Ben Vereen

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Natalie Cole are tonight's guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Natalie Cole, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Mama, Eunice, and Ed return from an inspiring Sunday sermon.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Paul Lynde guests as a real estate man. Also: The 10th Avenue Family & a performance from Carol's Charwoman.
Video.title: Paul Lynde
